rdf:Description.dc:publisher: Die Schriftkultur des christlichen Äthiopiens und Eritreas: Eine multimediale Forschungsumgebung / Beta maṣāḥǝft,

rdf:Description.dcterms:hasPart: Introductory Prayers
Prayer of the Covenant, ጸሎተ፡ ኪዳን፡
Supplications, መስተብቍዕ፡
Supplication for the Sick, በእንተ፡ ዱያን፡
Supplication for the Travelers, በእንተ፡ እለ፡ ይነግዱ፡
Supplication for the Rain, በእንተ፡ ዝናማት፡
Supplication for the Crops: በእንተ፡ ፍሬ፡ ምድር፡
Supplication for the King, በእንተ፡ ንጉሥ፡, mentioning Ḫāyla Śǝllāse I
Supplication for the Departed, “God of the Spirits,” አምላክ፡ ዘመናፍስት፡
Supplication for the Catacumens: በእንተ፡ ንዑሰ፡ ክርስቲያን፡
Supplication for the Departed, በእንተ፡ እለ፡ ኖሙ፡
Supplication for Peace, በእንተ፡ ሰላም፡
Litany, ሊጦን፡
Monday, እንዘ፡ ነአኵቶ፡
Tuesday, ስምከ፡ ሕያው፡
Thursday, ከመ፡ ታድኅነነ፡
Wednesday, ለትሩጽ፡ እግዚኦ፡
Friday, ተዘከር፡ እግዚኦ፡
Saturday, ቀዳሚ፡ ጸጋ፡
additional for Holy Saturday, ሶበ፡ አኮ፡ እግዚአብሔር፡
Sunday, ለአምላከ፡ ምሕረት፡
Prayers of Enthronment, ዘይነግሥ፡ ዘአቡነ፡ ያሬድ፡
Prayer of Enthronment of Thanksgiving, ዘይነግሥ: ነአኵቶ፡ ወንሴብሖ፡
Prayer of Enthronement of the Sick, ዘይነግሥ: በእንተ: ዱያን:
Prayer of Enthronement of the Rain, ዘይነግሥ፡ በእንተ፡ ዝናማት፡
Prayer of Enthronement of the Crops, ዘይነግሥ፡ በእንተ፡ ፍሬ፡ ምድር፡
Prayer of Enthronement for the King, ዘይነግሥ፡ በእንተ፡ ንጉሥ፡
Prayer of Enthronement for the Peace, ዘይነግሥ፡ በእንተ፡ ሰላም፡
Supplication for the Departed, “God of the Spirits,” አምላክ፡ ዘመናፍስት፡
Supplication for the Catacumens: በእንተ፡ ንዑሰ፡ ክርስቲያን፡
Supplication for the Departed, በእንተ፡ እለ፡ ኖሙ፡
Supplication for the Departed, እግዚአ፡ ህያዋን፡
Supplication for our Congregation, በእንተ፡ ማኅበርነ፡
Supplication for the Miracle of Mary, መስተብቍዕ፡ ዘተአምር፡
Supplication for the Cross, ወካዕበ፡ ናስተበቍዖ፡ ለዕፀ፡ ቅዱስ፡ መስቀል፡
Prayers over the utensils ጸሎት፡ ሶበ፡ ትሰይሞ፡ ለፃሕል፡
Preparatory Prayers and Instructions, or Order of the Egyptians, ጸሎተ፡ ሥርዓተ፡ ቅዳሴ (ሥርዓተ፡ ግብጽ)
Instructions for the Number of Blessing, ኈልቈ፡ ቡራኬያት፡
